examples: He made a harmonica out of the corncob.
Andrew jacks on also had a pipe made from a corncob.
Hey, why don't I go tell the little corncob you're here.
They could name it Zeke, buy it a little corncob pipe and a straw hat.
"My younger brother made himself a harmonica out of a corncob, and I didn't need no microphone, " she said.
